programme.title: Sokaler Sure
programme.desc: S1 , E1 : Talented singers and artists perform some of the most popular devotional and folk songs of Bengali music and enthral the audience with their performance.

programme.title: Pratham Dekha
programme.desc: Two struggling singers, who hope to make their way to the top, fall in love and fight to stay together amidst various societal barriers.

programme.title: Satru Mitra
programme.desc: A happy family goes through various trials and tribulations and falls apart when greed takes precedence over relationships.

programme.title: Mayer Ashirbad
programme.desc: After his mother's death, Modhu moves to the capital city where he becomes unpaid house help for his uncle. However, his fortune suddenly changes when he wins the lottery.

programme.title: Barkane
programme.desc: Sandip, an unemployed man, refuses a politician's offer to kill Tribeni, his rival. When Tribeni learns about this, she falls in love with him and offers dowry to his father.

programme.title: Sukh Dukher Sansar
programme.desc: Amar, the eldest of four, struggles to provide a better life to his younger siblings. However, things take a turn for the worse when his younger sister meets with an accident and is visually impaired.

programme.title: Swayamsiddha
programme.desc: Swayamsiddha is in for a rude shock when she gets to know that her husband has intellectual disabilities. When she learns that her brother-in-law is responsible for this, she decides to confront him.

programme.title: Biye Bibhraat
programme.desc: After a series of unsuccessful relationships, Shakya reluctantly consents to meet a prospective bride. However, things take an unexpected twist when the girl's former lover reenters the picture.

programme.title: Abar Kanchanjangha
programme.desc: Abar Kanchanjangha

programme.title: Patanjali Yog - By Yogrishi Swami Ramdev
programme.desc: S1 , E1475 : Baba Ramdev emphasises the importance of yoga and demonstrates various asanas and breathing exercises that enable one to lead a healthy and stress-free life.

programme.desc: Follow the life of Moosa, a fisherman who lives with his wife and two children and faces a lot of exciting and comedic paradoxes in his day-to-day life with family & work.

programme.title: Race
programme.desc: The relationship between two stepbrothers develops cracks when they fall in love with the same woman. As a result, the younger brother tries to kill the other and inherit the insurance money.

programme.title: Kadak Singh
programme.desc: Waking up in a hospital with amnesia, a financial officer sets out to solve an embezzlement scheme. Despite being unable to remember anything about himself, he tries to find clues in others' accounts.

programme.title: Judwaa 2
programme.desc: Raja and Prem, twins separated at birth but connected through reflexes, join forces as adults to take down an underground smuggling kingpin who threatens to destroy their family.

programme.title: Bhagam Bhag
programme.desc: Champak and his theatre troupe travel to London for a show. However, their plans go awry when they accidentally become pawns in a murder and drug conspiracy.

programme.title: Sholay
programme.desc: Jai and Veeru, two ex-convicts, are hired by Thakur Baldev Singh, a retired policeman, to help him nab Gabbar Singh, a notorious dacoit, who has spread havoc in the village of Ramgarh.

programme.title: Freddy
programme.desc: Freddy, a shy dentist, falls for Kainaaz and agrees to help her kill her abusive husband. However, upon discovering that her plan all along was to use him, Freddy sets out to seek revenge.

programme.title: Munjya
programme.desc: When Bittu visits his village, he uncovers a dark family secret involving a vengeful spirit, Munjya, who is desperate to marry. Bittu must navigate through chaos to protect himself and his lover.

programme.title: Ram Setu
programme.desc: Aryan, an archaeologist, is an atheist and publishes a controversial report on Rama Setu. Things take a turn when he sets out to prove its existence and becomes a believer in the process.

programme.title: Gunjan Saxena: The Kargil Girl
programme.desc: Despite her family's opposition, Gunjan Saxena becomes a pilot. She overcomes all hurdles and makes history as India's first female Air Force pilot to serve during the Kargil War.

programme.title: Force 2
programme.desc: ACP Yashwardhan, a dutiful and honest police officer, teams up with RAW agent Kamaljit Kaur to expose an inside informer who leaks sensitive information to a foreign agency targeting the RAW agents.

programme.title: Sarkar
programme.desc: Subhash Nagre runs a parallel government in the city where he has a cult following. When his enemies plot to murder him, his son takes charge and stands up against them to protect him.

programme.title: Sur
programme.desc: A renowned singer teaches a promising young student, but becomes jealous when her talent and fame eclipses his own.
